data.title: Singapore-based Trident Digital plans to raise $500M to establish a corporate XRP reserve
data.description:
Trident Digital, a Singapore-based company, has announced plans to raise $500 million to create the world’s first large-scale corporate XRP reserve. It will involve holding, staking, and deeply engaging in the Ripple ecosystem over the long term to improve its decentralized finance strategy. The rollout of the XRP reserve is set to happen in the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trident-digital-raise-500m-for-xrp-reserve/

data.title: Morpho Unveils V2 With Offered Liquidity and Dynamic Rates to Power Scalable DeFi Lending
data.description:
TL;DR Morpho launched V2, a new version that enables fixed-rate, fixed-term loans and custom conditions without fragmenting liquidity. The system introduces Markets V2, which allows peer-to-peer loan negotiation without relying on preset pools, and Vaults V2, featuring profitable, manageable vaults. V2 adopts market-defined pricing, removes KYC-based liquidity fragmentation, and lets users operate loans across multiple.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/morpho-unveils-v2-with-offered-liquidity-and-dynamic-rates-to-power-scalable-defi-lending/

data.title: DDC Enterprise Stock Slips 10.5% After New 38 BTC Acquisition
data.description:
DDC Enterprise has pursued its Bitcoin reserve plan by buying 38 more BTC, taking its total to 138 at an average cost of $78,582. The purchase has lifted shareholder exposure to 0. 029679 BTC per 1,000 shares, though the stock has traded 10. 5% lower since the announcement. The post DDC Enterprise Stock Slips 10.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ddc-enterprise-stock-slips-10-5-after-38-btc-buy/

data.title: Carney pushes for U.S. trade deal, warns Canada won’t wait forever
data.description:

In a French interview with Radio-Canada, Carney said talks are “intensive” and […]

data.title: Solana-Linked $1 Billion DeFi Dream Crushed By SEC Intervention
data.description:
DeFi Development Corp. hit a major roadblock this week when the US Securities and Exchange Commission blocked its $1 billion registration filing. The move came after regulators found that the company’s Form S-3 lacked a key internal controls report tied to its 10-K. As a result, DeFi Development—formerly known as Janover—pulled the filing and said it will fix the paperwork before trying again
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/solana-linked-1-billion-defi-dream-crushed-by-sec-intervention/

data.title: Australia Securities and Investments Commission bans financial adviser over $9.6M crypto scam
data.description:
Australia Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has banned a financial adviser for ten years over a crypto scam. In a recent media release, the regulator alleged that Glenda Maree Rogan misappropriated client funds with scam crypto investments. According to ASIC, Rogan transferred AU$14. 8 million (worth around US$9. 6 million) of clients’ funds to a crypto investment […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/australia-bans-financial-adviser-over-crypto/

data.title: ECB’s cycle of rate cuts is coming to an end
data.description:
The European Central Bank’s run of interest-rate cuts appears to be winding down, as inflation drifts back toward the ECB’s 2% goal and growth remains steady, Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel said Thursday in Brussels. Schnabel said the ECB’s cycle of rate reductions was drawing to a close now that “medium-term inflation is stabilizing around […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ecbs-cycle-of-rate-cuts-is-coming-to-an-end/
